articles.title: PeopleSoft 0-day affecting hundreds of organizations steals gigabytes of data
articles.content: Vulnerability in the Oracle-owned PeopleSoft software is about as critical as they come.
articles.titleZh: PeopleSoft 0-day影响数百个组织窃取数千兆字节的数据
articles.contentZh: Oracle拥有的PeopleSoft软件中的漏洞与它们一样严重。

articles.title: Locked in heated rivalry with researcher, Microsoft fixes 0-day they disclosed
articles.content: A separate zero-day also disclosed by Nightmare Eclipse appears to be patched as well.
articles.titleZh: 微软与研究人员激烈竞争，修复了他们披露的0天
articles.contentZh: Nightmare Eclipse披露的另一个零日似乎也被修补了。

articles.title: High-severity vulnerability in Linux caused by a single faulty character
articles.content: Use-after-free bug can be exploited to evade sandbox defenses.
articles.titleZh: Linux中由单个故障字符引起的高严重性漏洞
articles.contentZh: 自由使用后的漏洞可以被利用来逃避沙盒防御。

articles.title: For the 2nd time in weeks, Microsoft packages laced with credential stealer
articles.content: 73 packages run self-replicating stealer as soon as they're opened by an AI agent.
articles.titleZh: 几周内第二次， Microsoft软件包带有凭据窃取程序
articles.contentZh: 73个包裹在AI代理打开后立即运行自我复制窃取程序。

articles.title: Trump’s Anthropic shutdown just made the case for non-American AI
articles.content: At Washington's request, Anthropic suddenly took its newest and most powerful AI models offline over the weekend. The American company said it had little choice after the White House demanded it block access for all foreign nationals, including its own employees. Abroad, the incident offered a sobering reminder that the US not only dominates frontier […]
articles.titleZh: 特朗普的人类关闭刚刚为非美国人工智能提供了理由
articles.contentZh: 在华盛顿的要求下， Anthropic突然在周末将其最新、最强大的人工智能模型下线。这家美国公司表示，在白宫要求阻止包括其员工在内的所有外国公民进入之后，它别无选择。在国外，这一事件令人清醒地意识到，美国不仅在边境地区占据主导地位[…]

articles.title: Google Chrome is closing the loopholes that let old ad blockers keep working
articles.content: Google Chrome version 150 and 151, expected in late June and July, respectively, will cut off support for the last remaining workarounds for running older ad blockers, 9to5Google reports. Google phased out support for ad-blocking extensions built for Manifest V2, like uBlock Origin, in 2024. At that point, most Chrome users either switched to newer […]
articles.titleZh: 谷歌浏览器正在堵塞让旧广告拦截器继续工作的漏洞
articles.contentZh: 谷歌Chrome浏览器版本150和151预计分别于6月底和7月发布， 9to5Google报告称，它们将切断对运行旧版广告拦截器的最后剩余解决方案的支持。谷歌在2024年逐步淘汰了对为Manifest V2构建的广告拦截扩展的支持，例如uBlock Origin。此时，大多数Chrome用户要么切换到较新的[…]
